title: Prove the real Codex runtime path

limits.new_production_dependencies: allow only the official @openai/codex-sdk dependency pinned by pnpm-lock.yaml
limits.architecture_changes: forbid core, protocol, persistence, IPC and desktop architecture changes
limits.external_effects: allow one trivial subscription-authenticated Codex inference canary; forbid consequential external actions

stop_conditions: SDK requires API-key billing instead of the verified ChatGPT authentication session
credential or prompt content would enter tracked files, fixtures or logs
test failure after two bounded repair attempts
scope expansion into core protocols, persistence or desktop UI
